item.title: 1Password 让 Claude 无需交出密钥即可进入您的帐户
item.summary: 1Password is giving Claude a way into your online accounts without making your passwords part of the bargain. The new 1Password for Claude integration can fill login details while keeping the credentials hidden from Anthropic’s AI agent. Available now on Mac, the feature kicks in when Claude reaches a sign-in page duri
